title: watchlist-1.0 entry (plain-OSV-superset)
description: Schema for ONE supply-chain watchlist entry — the plain-OSV-superset finalized in docs/research/20260609_supply_chain_compromise_monitoring.md (RQ2 DECISION) and pinned by ADR-026 §2. `load_malware_db` (deps-scan/scripts/malware_db.py) parses target:dependency|tool unchanged via affected[].package.{name,ecosystem}+versions; the extension kind adds an `extension` block OUTSIDE affected[] (loader-ignored). Validated + Gate-2-gated by _shared/scripts/validate_watchlist.py. FROZEN by reference (ADR-026 §2): underspecification → follow-up against the schema doc, never fork the shape here.

id.description: The PRIMARY advisory id == the entry id (GHSA preferred; OSV/CVE ok). Non-empty.

target.description: REQUIRED extension tag: which capability this row feeds. RQ2 DECISION dropped `repos`.

modified.description: OSV field; used for incremental delta polling. ISO-8601 date.

affected.description: PLAIN OSV — load_malware_db reads exactly this for target:dependency|tool. May be empty [] for target:extension (the bad versions live in the `extension` block instead).

ecosystem.description: OSV-canonical ecosystem (PyPI/npm/Go/Maven/RubyGems/crates.io). Mandatory (provenance + dir path); NOT the match key today.

versions.description: Explicit list → exactly those versions are bad; absent/[] → whole-package wildcard '*' in the loader fold.

extension.description: target:extension block, OUTSIDE affected[] (loader-ignored; read by the ide-hygiene module). Required keys marketplace/id/bad_versions.

references.description: REQUIRED >=1 advisory provenance URL. Gate-2 additionally asserts id-bound host-allowlisted provenance (SEC-Q4) — the schema only guarantees shape + minItems.

database_specific.description: OSV's sanctioned namespace for non-standard fields — Gate-2-checked, loader-ignored. retrieved = when the feeder fetched it; watchlist_confidence: auto-extracted candidates land low, human review can raise.
